data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the Slack notification for the event `booking.created`, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the actual POST request to the Slack webhook or the expected message format. The linked use case specifies the requirement for this notification, yet the evidence does not demonstrate that the webhook is triggered or that the message is formatted correctly. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement for the Slack notification.
gaps: No evidence of the Slack webhook being triggered or the message being sent.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify Slack webhook integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the POST request is made to the Slack webhook with the correct message format.
